title: PIVOT - 211info
text: PRISM HEALTH PIVOT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sexual health services that include HIV and STI testing. 2236 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, or trans Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 279-7033 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (971) 279-7033 Pivot at Prism Multnomah County Intake (503) 846-2972 Washington County Intake (971) 361-8801 Clackamas County Application (503) 278-3869 HIV Self Testing Kit Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 15, stop ID 408; SE Belmont and SE 23rd Streets Services: HIV Testing * LGBTQ2+ Issues Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * LGBTQ2+ Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRISM HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PRISM HEALTH
